name: Gently Yonder — Pinterest auto-post via Buffer (GraphQL API)

meta.notes: Buffer NEW GraphQL API (public beta). Endpoint: https://api.buffer.com, auth: 'Authorization: Bearer <personal key>', body: {query, variables}. Set TWO env vars in n8n: BUFFER_ACCESS_TOKEN (your personal key) and BUFFER_CHANNEL_ID (your Pinterest channel id). Get the channel id by POSTing to https://api.buffer.com with these two queries: (1) query { account { organizations { id name } } }  -> copy the organization id; (2) query { channels(input:{organizationId:"ORG_ID"}) { id name service } } -> copy the id where service is 'pinterest'. Test with one manual run before enabling the schedule. Pinterest destination URL: for now the article link is appended to the post text; if createPost returns a MutationError about a required destination/link, we add the Pinterest metadata field.
